title: Hollow Knight Totems
description: Turns the Totem of Undying into Characters from Hollow Knight.
body:
Need a server for you and your friends? click the image below:

[![](https://cdn.apexminecrafthosting.com/img/theme/apex-hosting-mobile.png)](https://billing.apexminecrafthosting.com/aff.php?aff=16230)

# Hollow Knight Totems
This pack changes the Totem of Undying into characters(Maybe more to come.) from Hollow Knight. Depending on what version you download, it is as simple as renaming the Totem of Undying to the characters name. These will have different Totem Sounds if you download the character's pack otherwise it's just the Vanilla Sound.

## Name for the Totem

- The Knight Totem = "The Knight"

![Knight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8815e50190c64f38150c18cc27d4b291a259ab4.png)

- Hornet Totem = "Hornet"

![Hornet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09992ff0eb3701cba0b71f88fc1c2a800f3c9dc9.png)

## Verisons Explained
All other packs a part from "All Characters" will replace the Totem completely, while the "All Characters" will be when you rename the Totem.
